summary: Classified live PR inventory shard conservatively using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was invented; all listed PRs remain open for maintainer/author follow-up. The only security-sensitive hydrated linked ref is quarantined separately.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked issue must route to central OpenClaw security handling; no closure, label, comment, fix, or merge should be planned by this worker.
